name: Battery Life
description: Short battery life
examples: That power charge only last about 4 hours.

name: User Satisfaction
description: Positive user experience
examples: Love, love love it

name: Physical Design
description: Good physical design
examples: The case (which is smaller than I anticipated, +++) is very clever and well-working.

name: Call Quality
description: Sporadic connection drops
examples: There's 0% risk of them falling out by accident. Great physical design. - Sporadic dropping of connection for about 5-10s at a time (on average 1-3 times per call). Not OK.

name: Sound Quality
description: White noise hissing and glitching
examples: The sound quality is weird. You can hear white noise hissing sound when people on the other end are talking, which is not present with any other speaker / headphone system. The sound also glitches quite often.

name: Siri Functionality
description: Rigid and useless controls
examples: Siri-based controlling is just plain trash. It's a rigid, useless way of even handling the most basic of controls that it's just not worth it.

name: Kids Dislike
description: Kids don't like it
examples: There’s only one thing wrong...I have to hide them from my kids.

name: Seamless Integration
description: The headphones work well with other devices.
examples: They work seamlessly with all my Apple gear.
The AirPods box having stains on it.
The battery life when I am listening ongoing is not bad but I can still hear other sounds when the sound is not turned up high.

name: Comfort
description: The ease of wearing the headphones for extended periods.
examples: The problem is that after about an hour, they get very uncomfortable on my head.
Being an engineer, I have to wonder if it’s the weight, or the tension holding them against my head, or the material in the ear cups, or all of the above.
Ears hurting

name: Aesthetics
description: The visual appeal of the product.
examples: They are just beautiful to look at.
I’m willing to give them another try, especially since everything else about them is so great.

name: Packaging Quality
description: The condition and appearance of the packaging.
examples: I open the box to the AirPods box having stains on it.
The product missing the charging cable and only comes with 1 pair of bud tips when it should be 3 (small, medium, large).

name: Missing Components
description: Whether all necessary parts are included.
examples: It’s missing the charging cable and only comes with 1 pair of bud tips when it should be 3 (small, medium, large).
I wish I’d kept the regular. These continually fall out of my ears

name: Charging Cable Availability
description: The presence and quantity of the charging cable.
examples: It’s missing the charging cable and only comes with 1 pair of bud tips when it should be 3 (small, medium, large).
Just gonna order some through Apple like I should’ve did in the first place

name: Noise Cancellation
description: The effectiveness of noise-canceling features.
examples: I like the noise canceling sound.
Upgrade to the Pro version, but prefer the regular version because the noise-canceling feature causes them to fall out.

name: Comfort in Use
description: The comfort while wearing the product.
examples: The problem is that after about an hour, they get very uncomfortable on my head.
I wish I’d kept the regular. These continually fall out of my ears.

name: Product Design
description: The design and build quality of the product.
examples: They are just beautiful to look at.
I’m willing to give them another try, especially since everything else about them is so great.

name: Noise Canceling
description: The effectiveness of noise-canceling features.
examples: I like the noise canceling sound.
Upgrade to the Pro version, but prefer the regular version because the noise-canceling feature causes them to fall out.

name: Background Noise
description: Unwanted noise when listening.
examples: I cannot keep them in for long as it makes my ears hurt.
Background noise when the sound is not turned up high.

name: sound_quality
description: Great sound quality with active noise cancellation and pass through settings working well.
examples: The active noice cancellation is great
The pass through setting works great!

name: noise_cancellation
description: Effective noise cancellation, especially in active mode.
examples: The active noice cancellation is great

name: overall_satisfaction
description: Overall positive experience with the product.
examples: I love these!!

name: product fit issues
description: Issues related to the product's physical fit and comfort.
examples: I decided to return and get the AirPods Pro which have eartips helping to create a better fit.
I can’t get them to stay in my ears

name: noise cancelling feature
description: The ability of the product to cancel background noise.
examples: I really like that it has noise cancelling and the sound is great as well.

name: better product fit with specific model
description: Better fit and comfort with a specific product model.
examples: Upgrading from AirPods 2, which fit my ear fine, to AirPods 3–the part that sits in your ear is shaped differently and is a bit larger.

name: seamless_integration
description: Seamlessly integrates with devices in the Apple ecosystem
examples: I found it funny to see so many people walking around with AirPods in their ears. After we got my son a pair for Christmas and I tried them, I ended up getting a pair for myself. They work seamlessly with my iPhone and are awesome to use with my Apple TV as well.

name: suitability_for_exercise
description: Suitable for exercise
examples: I use them for running and weightlifting without any issues so far.

name: spatial_audio
description: Spatial audio
examples: The audio is rich with strong bass and midrange. Although more expensive than a lot of similar products, Apple wins hands-down with design and integration with their products.

name: audio_quality
description: Rich audio with strong bass and midrange
examples: The audio is rich with strong bass and midrange.

name: general_perfection
description: General perfection
examples: Perfect
